title: micromeria serpyllifolia
intro: Micromeria serpyllifolia, also known as Greek mountain tea or wild marjoram, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Greece and other parts of the Mediterranean. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Micromeria serpyllifolia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be consumed hot or cold, and is also used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and capsules.
